name: Owl
description: Nocturnal hunter. Silent, watchful, and deeply associated with wisdom and death in folklore.

sensory.sight: two enormous eyes catching firelight from a branch you didn't check, then gone
sensory.sound: nothing — owls are silent in flight. Then a hoot, close, from a direction you can't place
sensory.feel: the sensation of being watched in the dark by something that sees perfectly

encounter_hooks: pellets on the forest floor — bones and fur, neatly packaged
a hoot that sounds like a question, repeated three times
a shadow passing across the moon, wingspan wider than your arms
notes: Owls are mood. A hoot at night while the party camps is atmosphere. In Threadhallow, owls are associated with Morrith Hollowdark (death/liminal) — hearing one near a ward-circle is considered an omen.
